items.title: Markets Gain on Muted Response from Iran
items.description: Calls for peace in the region from President Trump look to have been taken to heart -- if not by the mullahs in charge of Iran, then by traders in today's stock indexes.

items.title: Stocks Rally on Hopes of De-Escalation of Hostilities in the Middle East
items.description: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX ) (SPY ) Monday closed up +0.96%, the Dow Jones Industrials Index ($DOWI ) (DIA ) closed up +0.89%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX ) (QQQ ) closed up +1.06%. September E-mini S&P futures (ESU25 ) are up +0.96%, and September E-mini Nasdaq futures...

items.title: IGV: Software Names Nearing Another Key Breakout, Monitoring The P/E
items.description: IGV offers exposure to high-growth US large-cap software names, with a premium P/E but robust historical and forward earnings growth. Read more on IGV here.

items.title: Iran Blinks, Oil Sinks, Stocks Wink
Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq jump, oil slides on Iran's restrained response to US strikes
items.description: Investors are assessing how far Iran will go in its response to the US entering the Israel-Iran conflict.
